---
title: "Get in Touch"
---

::: {.section-intro}
Available to discuss your project, answer questions about CEPSCI inspection requirements, or provide a quote for ongoing weekly inspections.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="contact-card">
  <h3>Darya Dimintiyanova</h3>
  <p class="subtitle">CEPSCI-Certified Inspector · Upstate South Carolina</p>
  <hr>
  <a href="mailto:darya.cepsci@gmail.com" class="email-link">darya.cepsci@gmail.com</a>
  <div class="service-area">
    Serving Anderson County, Pickens County,<br>and surrounding Upstate SC counties.
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="service-block">
  <h2>What to Include in Your Message</h2>
  <p>To get the fastest response and an accurate quote, please include:</p>
  <ul>
    <li><strong>Project location</strong> — county and municipality</li>
    <li><strong>Site acreage</strong> — total disturbed area</li>
    <li><strong>Project start date</strong> — when inspection services are needed</li>
    <li><strong>Project duration</strong> — estimated end date or number of months</li>
    <li><strong>Permit status</strong> — whether your NPDES permit is already in place</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="service-block">
  <h2>Response Time</h2>
  <p>I typically respond to inquiries within <strong>one business day</strong>. For urgent compliance needs, please indicate that in the subject line of your email.</p>
</div>
```
